storyboard.content: I've been feeling really down and unmotivated for months and I've lost interest in things I used to love, like playing guitar and seeing friends.
My sleep is all over the place — sometimes I lie awake for hours, other times I sleep way too much.
I often feel worthless and just empty and numb most days.
I'm finding it really hard to concentrate at work.
This has been going on for about 4 months.
It's affecting my work and my relationships, but I can still handle basic day-to-day things.
I'm not having any thoughts of hurting myself.
